docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHIU, TRACEY AS TO DEFENDANT LUCZAK, MICHAEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,600.00 FILED BY SHIU, TRACEY AS TO DEFENDANT LUCZAK, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SHIU, TRACEY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NO SUCH STREET" COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUCZAK, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-10-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF TRACEY SHIU. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MICHAEL LUCZAK. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED SEP-29-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUCZAK, MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIU, TRACEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUCZAK, MICHAEL $4,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,850.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,500.00 DUE TO DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH LACK OF COMPLIANCE WITH CIVL CODE SECTION 1950.5(E). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
